description: x2 150mmx150mm yellow hard plastic slow feeder x2 150mmx150mm black silicon lick mat 4 pieces connect like a jigsaw, great for fast eaters or for added enrichment. Put food in the black slow feeder sections and peanut butter or other pastes in the yellow lick mat sections. Suction cup base to keep it in place, even put the yellow lick mat on the wall for your dog to lick. You can separate the 4 pieces and spread them around your home for your dog to find for a bit of fun. Made from non-toxic, freezer safe material.
